# Lorraine K. Lee

> Keynote speaker, LinkedIn Learning instructor, and author of Unforgettable Presence®. Lorraine K. Lee helps professionals and teams communicate with confidence, build executive presence, and get recognized for the work they do.

Lorraine K. Lee is a corporate keynote speaker and educator on professional presence, executive presence, communication, and personal branding. She is the Amazon #1 bestselling author of Unforgettable Presence® (named a must-read by Next Big Idea Club), a LinkedIn Top Voice, and an instructor at LinkedIn Learning, Stanford Continuing Studies, and MasterClass with 250,000+ students taught. She has been a keynote speaker for Zoom, Google, Cisco, McKinsey, LinkedIn, and dozens more. This site covers her book, speaking and workshops, coaching and consulting, online courses, and published writing and media.

## Main pages

- [About Lorraine](https://lorraineklee.com/about/): Bio and career story, credentials, and awards (Amazon #1 bestselling author, LinkedIn Top Voice, Webby Honoree, 300,000+ LinkedIn followers).
- [Speaking](https://lorraineklee.com/speaking/): Book Lorraine for keynotes and workshops on presence, communication, and personal branding for managers and high-potential teams.
- [Unforgettable Presence® (the book)](https://lorraineklee.com/book/): Her Amazon #1 bestseller (Wiley) on getting seen, gaining influence, and catapulting your career. Hardcover, eBook, and audiobook read by Lorraine.
- [Contact](https://lorraineklee.com/contact/): Reach out about speaking, coaching, press, or general questions; replies within 2 business days.

## Work with Lorraine

- [Coaching](https://lorraineklee.com/coaching/): Coaching for high-achieving professionals to grow their confidence, presence, and impact (multiple coaching tiers).
- [Consulting](https://lorraineklee.com/consulting/): Strategic, tailored support for the C-Suite, teams, and organizations, including LinkedIn C-Suite strategy, content strategy, and executive presence programs.

## Learn

- [Learn hub](https://lorraineklee.com/learn/): Lorraine's courses and learning resources, including her free email course.
- [LinkedIn Learning courses](https://lorraineklee.com/courses/): Her catalog of LinkedIn Learning courses (250,000+ enrollments) on communication, presence, management, and remote/hybrid work.
- [Free 5-day course: From Invisible to Influential](https://lorraineklee.com/from-invisible-to-influential/): A free email course to communicate your value, get visible to decision-makers, and position yourself for the next level in 20 minutes a day.

## Writing and media

- [Thought leadership](https://lorraineklee.com/thought-leadership/): Frameworks on presence, communication, and personal branding, plus recent podcast, webinar, and LinkedIn News appearances.
- [Articles](https://lorraineklee.com/articles/): Authored and selected articles.
- [Interviews](https://lorraineklee.com/interviews/): Lorraine's guest interviews on podcasts and LinkedIn Lives, plus her own conversations interviewing leaders such as Chelsea Clinton, Justin Baldoni, and Kat Cole.
- [Featured in](https://lorraineklee.com/featured-in/): Press and media features (Forbes, CNBC, CNN, Fast Company, Business Insider, Inc., Entrepreneur, and more).
- [Testimonials](https://lorraineklee.com/testimonials/): What clients and audiences say about working with Lorraine.

## For media and event organizers

- [Media kit](https://lorraineklee.com/media-kit/): Headshots, bio, and assets for press and event organizers.
- [Speaker bio](https://lorraineklee.com/speaker-bio/): Short and long speaker bios.

## Keynote topics

- [Communicate with Confidence in a Virtual World](https://lorraineklee.com/keynotes/communicate-with-confidence-in-a-virtual-world/)
- [How to Build Influence in the Hybrid Office](https://lorraineklee.com/keynotes/how-to-build-influence-in-the-hybrid-office/)
- [How to Build Your LinkedIn Presence](https://lorraineklee.com/keynotes/how-to-build-your-linkedin-presence/)
- [How to Lead with Impact: Strategies to Build Collaboration and Trust on Your Team](https://lorraineklee.com/keynotes/how-to-lead-with-impact-strategies-to-build-collaboration-and-trust-on-your-team/)
- [How to Present Like a Pro](https://lorraineklee.com/keynotes/how-to-present-like-a-pro/)
- [How to Stand Out Virtually: Video and LinkedIn Essentials](https://lorraineklee.com/keynotes/how-to-stand-out-virtually-video-and-linkedin-essentials/)
- [Make a Memorable First Impression on Video: The TEA Method](https://lorraineklee.com/keynotes/make-a-memorable-first-impression-on-video-the-tea-method/)
- [Supercharge Your Executive Presence: A Leader's Guide to Managing Your Brand at Work](https://lorraineklee.com/keynotes/supercharge-your-executive-presence-a-leaders-guide-to-managing-your-brand-at-work/)
- [9 Essential Tips for More Effective Hybrid and Virtual Meetings](https://lorraineklee.com/keynotes/9-essential-tips-for-more-effective-hybrid-and-virtual-meetings/)
